feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Work zone differences and widgets
entry.content:
Hi, sorry. How can I see the templates for de SAP Bussiness Workzone and the widgets that I can use?

Also, what is the difference between SAP Build Work zone and SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Actions in SAP Build Process Automation -- Need to call $Batch in Action Task
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to implement a batch call in Build Process Automation using an Action Task. I have configured the destination in the BTP Cockpit and also created an Action Project in SAP Build.

When testing the Action Project independently, I am able to retrieve the expected data. However, when using it within a workflow, I am encountering the following error:

Action Identifier:
post_batch
Destination:
GET_DATA
Error Message:
Action '7a1f2496-6c0d-48ce-a724-9ca2651d8fab' failed with the following error:
'Action metadata not found in database for tenant f5a191b7-809f-4113-87fe-6b21da19d542, project us10.93112af8trial.getdatacall, version 1.0.3, action group b315b59d-bafd-3cbf-a4a2-79a0743dfac0, and action post_batch'.

Log ID:
fdc268b4-2c5c-439a-814b-802b67e-us10

I have also attached a screenshot of the configuration.
Please let me know how I can resolve this issue.

Destination Config Screenshot:

Action Config Screenshot:

 

BPA workflow Screenshot:

Thanks,

Parth

entry.title: Logout functionality SAP CAP application deployed in Cloud Foundry using Managed approuter
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have built a SAP CAP application with UI5 and used managed approuter. The application is deployed in Cloud Foundry and I can access it through HTML5 applications. This application uses XSUAA authentication. 

I want to implement logout functionality in this application for the user. I have read many blogs and I'm unable to implement it. I have done things like making changes in xs-app.json file to include the logout parameter as described in the link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/logout

On the logout button in my app, i put the controller logic to 

window.location.replace("/my/logout").

After this when I click on logout, it takes me to a URL:
"https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/resources/sap-ui-logout-url" and when i click the back button, it again goes directly into the application logged in as the previous user, which means that it is not deleting the session maybe.

I even followed the question:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/logout-sap-ui5-app-cloud-foundry-sample-code/qaq-p/12248689

(Yes, I gave relative path in the controller script like my/logout as I am using managed approuter)

But when i do this, i get an internal server error after clicking on logout.

On checking the error logs of the app, I see the error as:
GET request to /74cf1c07-1827-49d2-9bc9-90ba4d9f6781.capleavemanagementappservice.leavemanagement-1.0.0/my/logout completed with status 500 request method (GET) does not match logout configuration logoutMethod (POST)


Does anybody know how can I implement a logout functionality in my application?

Thanks,
Raihan

entry.title: Unable to view tile on SAP Work Zone
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Good afternoon. I hope you are all doing well.

We have successfully created a tile with a custom Semantic Object, which navigates to a custom transaction and functions correctly on the S/4HANA Fiori Launchpad. However, despite properly exposing the content from the S/4HANA system, the same functionality does not appear to be synced with Workzone.

I would greatly appreciate your guidance in resolving this issue. Thank you in advance for your support.

Best regards, Ramesh Reddy

entry.title: How to Generate a Dynamic URL for Approval Task in SAP Business Process Automation (SAP BPA)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm working on a workflow using SAP Build Process Automation and need help with generating a dynamic task approval link that can be sent via email notification to the approver.

Objective:

  • Generate a dynamic URL for each task instance.

  • Send the URL via email template or script task.

  • Clicking the link should open the approval task directly in My Inbox or SAP Build Work Zone / Launchpad.

Thanks in advance,
Parshuram

entry.title: Re-use a deployed HTML5 app in a new application with managed Application router
entry.content:
I'm currently working on understanding how SAP Build workzone using managed application router works.

I've used this as the boilerplate code :multi-cloud-html5-apps-samples/managed-html5-runtime-basic-mta at main · SAP-samples/multi-cloud-html5-apps-samples · GitHub

Within this I have added a backend module (Nodejs) with the route setup as below which targets a destination 'backend-api' that I have configured using destination service.

{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "/user-api/currentUser$",
      "target": "/currentUser",
      "service": "sap-approuter-userapi"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/api/(.*)$",
      "target": "/api/$1",
      "destination": "backend-api",
      "authenticationType": "none"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
    
  ]
}

  This setup so far works fine.

Now, I want to re-use an HTML5 app that is already deployed in the subaccount that I'm currently working on.

I also want to configure xs-app.json in my application to view this UI.

I see the html5 app when I execute 'cf html5-list' in my target space. It is hosted on an HTML5 App repository service instance named 'sample-app-repo-dt' (app-host plan)

Can someone please help in guiding me or providing any existing documentation on how this can be done.

entry.title: Role assignment confusion
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm working on SAP SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition where i have setup everything, my spaces,applciations and pages and everything is working. Until i have decided to create a new role for certain users.
In this role i have set the spaces along side with the applications yet when i assign the role for the user it's not taking an affect and Eveyone role is the one still in affect instead.

Below are the steps i performed:

  1. I created & configured the role on workzone
     

     


     

  2. I have enabled the role on Role Assignments

     

  3. I have created a new user and a new user group on CIS

  4. I have assigned the role with the user group that was created on CIS

     

  5. Then on CIS i have assigned the user group to the user


Am i missing something ?

entry.title: SSO not working. OAuth2UserTokenExchange. Unable to login to travel list app
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

Recently I deployed an app to HTML5 Repository in SAP BTP

html5 app repository:

when i click on "sapfedemotravellist"  , i am presented with an alert in the new tab:

even after putting correct id and password this just keeps on coming. I tried with client id and client secret also and still the same alert keep popping.

Please help me resolve this issue.

Destination:

Destination Trust:

Trial Users:

Subaccount Trial: Trust Configuration:

Subscriptions & Instances:

App's xs-security.json

{
  "xsappname": "sapfedemotravellist",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "description": "Security profile of called application",
  "scopes": [],
  "role-templates": []
}
 
xs-app.json
 
{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "destination": "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-########trial-dev",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

Please help in this regard.

@SAPSupport 

@jlong 

@K120525 

@dennis_koehler 

@DonWilliams 

@paula_augedahl 

@Sandra_Rossi 

@William_Wu 

@Ulrich_Schmidt1 

@sapcommunity

entry.title: HTML5 Apps launched form SAP build workzone site are not opening
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm trying to launch my HTML5 application from build workzone. The application renders successfully when I open it from 'HTML5 Applications' in BTP cockpit subaccount.

However, after adding them to a business site in build workzone, the UI keeps loading and I see 500 errors in Component.js and Component-preload.js. I do not see this issue mentioned in the troubleshooting section of official doc.

Attaching a few screenshots for reference.

App stuck at this page while launching from build workzone site

Network calls and console:

 

 

 

Any suggestions on how to proceed will be appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT Subaccount
entry.content:
cf html5-list showing 

But still unable to see in HTML5 Application in SAP BTP COCKPIT Subaccount.
Should I wait as it is in Trial Account ?

Hence Content Manager also not showing anything 


Please find the detail.

This is regarding my trial account 7bc94454trial.
 
Here the below UI5 app
"hanaodataservices.ui5fristapponhanaodata"
is not showing in the HTML5 Application under BTP Subaccount after successful deployment to cloud foundry, cf html5-list also showing the same & I have all the role collection access, Servcices deployed and entitlement and subscription intact.
 
Please find all the required screenshots.
 
region -us10

 

 
 

 

 
 

 


Need help on the same.

entry.title: Channel with source type “Subscription”
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use SAP Build Work Zone to access SAP Asset Performance Management (APM) for extensibility purposes. However, I am unable to find an option to create a channel with the source type set as “Subscription”.

Could you please guide me on how to achieve this or share any relevant documentation or prerequisites that need to be fulfilled?

Thanks and Regards,
Shirsendu Roy

entry.title: Instalación de Desktop Agent en SBPA.
entry.content:
Estimados.

Buenas tardes.

Junto con saludar, quería solicitar ayuda, ya que actualmente tenemos una instalación del desktop agent de Sap Build Process Automation, para lo cual lo utilizamos para la función de las automatizaciones del Workflow implementado, para la instalación del ejecutable y servicio me guie por la siguiente documentación:

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/install-desktop-agent-3-8c42e11b33824acc8273713f276589ea
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/desktop-agent-service

En su momento se instaló el agente en el servidor a través de un usuario en específico, por lo cual, cuando el servidor realizaba las actualizaciones el agente se desconectaba debido a que solicitaba al usuario del servidor el ingreso de sesión, por dicho motivo, se realizó el cambio y se instaló en la máquina con el usuario de administrador, sin embargo, en la actualidad, cuando se realizan las actualizaciones automáticas del servidor también el agente se desconecta, dicho agente, ya se encuentra instalado también como servicio y dicho servicio cuando se visualiza el estado se encuentra en "running" , sin embargo, el agente aun así se desconecta. Esto me ocurre para el servidor de QA que tiene las actualizaciones de manera automática, no así, para el agente que se encuentra instalado en el servidor de PRD, ya que este servidor se encuentra con las actualizaciones programadas y el agente no se desconecta.

La versión que se está utilizando es la 3.32.58 y el modo se encuentra como "no asistido", si bien se entiende que existe una última actualización de dicho agente, no es compatible con la versión 1.48.34 del SDK ya deployado del proyecto. 

Quisiera saber si alguien ha instalado dicho agente en el servidor y como se puede estabilizar el estado de este.

Muchas gracias.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start via SAP Start Booster – No Apps or Products Showing Post Setup (Foundation Plan)
entry.content:
Hi @sapcommunity  & @sapexperts 

We are currently working on enabling access to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Fiori applications via the SAP Mobile Start app, using the SAP Start booster in SAP BTP. However, we are facing an issue where no content appears on the SAP Start launchpad—even though the setup completes successfully.

Initial Approach – Manual Configuration

Initially, we tried to manually expose S/4HANA content to SAP Build Work Zone (Foundation Plan):

  • Verified that relevant business catalogs were marked as “Available for SAP Build Work Zone / SAP Start.”

  • Ensured that business roles were properly configured and exposed to SAP BTP.

Challenge:
Due to limitations of the Foundation Plan, we were unable to access the Content Manager or assign roles in the Site Directory, which prevented us from proceeding further with manual setup.

References Followed:
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/Setting-Up-SAP-Build-Work-Zone-standard-edition-and-SAP-Mobile-Start-with-SAP-S-4HANA/importing-content-to-sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition-2-2

Alternative Approach – SAP Start Booster

To overcome these constraints, we executed the “Set Up SAP Start” Booster from SAP BTP. The booster ran successfully and completed the following:

  • ✅ Created the BTP subaccount, assigned entitlements, and configured trust.

  • ✅ Subscribed to SAP Build Work Zone – Foundation Plan.

  • ✅ Configured destinations to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud system.

  • ✅ Created the default SAP Start site.

  • ✅ Set up SAP Cloud Identity Services (IAS and IPS).

  • ✅ Integrated the S/4HANA Cloud system automatically.

As a result, the SAP Start site is now accessible via both desktop and the SAP Mobile Start app.

References Followed:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/setting-up-sap-start-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13573816

Current Issue

Despite the successful booster execution:

  • ⚠️ SAP Start site shows the message:
    “Currently, there aren’t any products for you. Please check back again later.”

  • ⚠️ No Fiori apps or S/4HANA content is visible in the launchpad.

Troubleshooting Performed

We have already validated the following:

  • 🔹 Trust configuration between BTP and IAS is correctly set.

  • 🔹 Users are provisioned and mapped properly via IPS.

  • 🔹 Exposed business catalogs and roles in S/4HANA.

  • 🔹 Booster completed without any reported errors.

  • 🔹 Attempted to recheck destinations and Channel Manager (though limited under Foundation Plan).

  • 🔹 Tried accessing SAP Start from both desktop and mobile, same result.

Request for Help / Clarifications

We’d appreciate your support with the following:

  1. Is there any missing step required to make the apps visible after the booster setup?

  2. Does the Foundation Plan impose any limitation that restricts content visibility in SAP Start?

  3. Would upgrading to SAP Build Work Zone – Standard Plan be required for full SAP Start functionality?

  4. Can anyone who successfully implemented SAP Mobile Start via Foundation Plan share insights?

Any pointers or confirmations from the SAP team or community experts would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
Nithesh T S

entry.title: My processes(My requests) App will not show anything in SAP Build Work Zone with BTP Free trial
entry.content:
Hello experts

I am exploring SAP Build Work Zone and process automation with BTP free trial. I set up work zone Business site that can trigger a Process which was defined in Build Process automation and also monitor the progress of approvals performed in both Public and Shared environment with my inbox and Monitor workflow Apps in Work zone.

However, My processes app will not be able to show any Process details but loading eternally. Am I missing some configurations or this is happing simply because Work zone standard option or free trial is not supporting My processes(My requests) App?

I checked required configuration in SAP help and seems everything is set. I appreciate any help or thoughts 🙂

Kind Regards,

Eitaro

P.S.
These two sites helped me set up Work zone and Business sites.
Configure SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition | SAP Tutorials

Run a Business Process From the Business Site | SAP Tutorials

entry.title: Open a page from an app in SAP Build work zone standard edition
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am trying to open a page from a URL app by giving the complete page url in sap build work zone, standard edition.

The Page and app is created manually in the SAP Build work zone, Standard edition.

below is the url of the page which I have configure in app as url:

https://<Host Name>/Portal#Launchpad-openFLPPage?pageId=2566a3e3-a381-4cb2-8326-75f529f6f732
 
but after clicking on the app, it is giving error:
 
Sorry, the app couldn't be opened.
The navigation target "#Launchpad-openFLPPage?pageId=2566a3e3-a381-4cb2-8326-75f529f6f732%3Fsap-locale%3Den&sap-shell=FLP&sap-theme=custom_wasl_theme%40https%3A%2F%2Fwasl-sap-mobile-start.launchpad.cfapps.eu20.hana.ondemand.com%2Fcomsapuitheming.runtime%2Fthemeroot%2Fv1%2F~v%3DBase%3A11.31.0%2C*.*.custom_wasl_theme(sap_horizon)%3A20250527T062602Z%23zbupa-display%3Fsap-ui-app-id-hint%3D77c3e8a2-dece-475a-bd0c-5c317fd6d08b" of the app could not be resolved. This can be caused, for example, by an incorrect content configuration, an incorrect or missing role assignment, or because your current device is not supported.
 
 
Please let me know if there is any missing configuration for this or is there any other wat to achieve this.
Thanks in advance.

Regards,
Rohit Gera

entry.title: To enable Studio Home Application in SAP Buildworkzone
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have followed the prerequisites in the below help documentation to configure the Studio Home Application in SAP Buildworkzone.
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/configure-studio-home-application?q=studio+home

However, I could not see the studio home application in the Buildworkzone. I have refreshed the HTML content manager. I don't see such application available in workzone, but the other apps like My Inbox, Visibility scenario, Process etc.
I also read the blog https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-and-automation-blog-posts/empowering-business-to-manage-decisions-in-sap-build-process-automation/ba-p/14092130

Can someone help me to figure out what I was missing? or please chare clear steps to see the Studio Home application in Buildworkzone.

entry.title: Error on Logout event from SAP Build Work Zone in SAPUI5 page
entry.content:
I am trying to attach a callback to the Logout event from the SAP Build Work Zone in my SAPUI5 application, to then request a logout in my approuter application. This is the logic I added to enable the event:

// UI5 Component
export default class Component extends UIComponent {
	//...
	public init(): void {
		//...

		// Log out when the user clicks the logout button in the shell header (BWZ)
		Container.attachLogoutEvent(() => {
			console.log("Logout event triggered, redirecting to logout endpoint.");
			window.location.replace('/do/logout');
		}, false)
	}
}

 The callback is working on my local tests, and I can see the log message on the console. However, when I try to do same thing inside our SAP Build Work Zone subscription, the callback doesn't run and we see a error message:

 After investigating the source files I notices this error happens when the Logout Event is being created and a deprecated part of the code executes. I wasn't able to find any configurations on SAP Build Work Zone that would fix it, but I might have missed something?

Has anyone else seen this error before? How can I contact the SAP Build Work Zone team to get support?

Thanks

entry.title: [Free Tier] No IAS tenant available when trying to establish trust (SAP BTP)
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm using SAP BTP Free Tier (Pay-as-you-go) and trying to subscribe to services like SAP Build Work Zone and Launchpad.

However, when I try to "Establish Trust" in the subaccount, **no identity Authentication tenant is listed** in the tenant selection.

The screen just shows "No available tenant"

I alreay created an instance of "Cloud Identity Services(default)" in my subaccount. I also received an S-user via email.

Still, I cannot proceed because no IAS tenant is available for selection.

Here ar my details.

- Global Account ID: S0027108224

- Subaccount: dorandev

- Region: AWS South Korea

- Email: doran@doranlab.dev

How can I request or link an IAS tenant for this subaccount? Any help would be appreciated!

Thank you

entry.title: Issue while doing Neo Cloud Portal Site Migration to SAP BTP Workzone Standard Edition
entry.content:
Hello Community Members,

I am doing a migration of neo cloud portal site to workzone standard edition using the Migrating SAP Cloud Portal Sites (Neo Environment) to SAP Build Work Zone | SAP Help Portal .
When doing the migration steps : step 2 - convert downloaded zip file (exported cloud site zip file) to supported format in CF , i am facing an issue. Attaching the image of the issue : 

Can anyone help me to resolve this issue ?

Thanks.

SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition  SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment

entry.title: Cannot Update Content Package Due to ID Mismatch in SAP Build Work Zone
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm currently working with SAP Build Work Zone and encountered an issue while trying to update an existing content package.

I’m getting the following error message:

"Trying to upload a content package with a different ID than the ID of the existing content package."

Here is what I’ve done:

  • I modified the content and re-zipped it with the correct structure (manifest.json, artifacts/, i18n/ at root level).

  • In the manifest.json, the sap.package.id is still exactly the same:

    json
     
    { "sap.package": { "id": "cnma.contentPackage" } }

The strange thing is:

  • I uploaded a similar package 2 days ago with the same ID, and it worked fine. Now even small changes result in this error.

Looking forward to your advice and experience.
Appreciate your support! 🙌
